title: CatalogModule
description: A named module from the prompt catalog, selected to build a dossier section (agency/capabilities/prompt/ontology.py; Spec 153 Slice 6 — prompt-dossier wave). Modules are ranked A/B/C by coverage depth; the dossier author picks from the live catalog via prompt.list_modules.

category.description: Coverage depth: A = comprehensive, B = standard, C = lightweight.

identifier.description: Stable kebab-case identifier for the module, e.g. 'character-voice'.
